【群星+战锤+第四天灾+腹黑爆笑+血流成河+无女主】
当人类文明摆脱重力抵达星海，残酷而又灿烂的战争游戏便开始了。
每一位领主系的强者，都是整个人类文明宝贵的希望之光，他们将会为整个人类文明带来前进的福音。
在这个文明百花齐放的时刻，一个噩耗席卷了星海。
天灾降临，星海古老传说中会毁灭一切物种的天灾文明。
所有文明都被迫开始军备竞赛，以求在三大天灾文明降临后能够活下去。
此时，周平安打开个人面板，看着自己的天赋陷入了沉思。
【第四天灾飞升途径已就绪，请天灾皇帝拿下星海】
坏了，我是最终大BOSS。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o072c395d3c191cbf0fdd04396d315761~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"红羊","author_id":"","book_id":"7355277290973973528","book_name":"群星：我没输过，你说我是战犯？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182868","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7355287019167171096","read_count":"22055","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"877637"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"357","tags":"科幻末世,星际,腹黑,无女主,天灾,搞笑轻松,争霸,无后宫,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/821fe31966cdc86845e514e3b78438b3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394116&x-signature=m%2FRRJ0fQnESl8T7ubSb%2BZUYZPS0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3360525062512830","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040836604AFB0A62E459CD2C89"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":275,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":10,"show_pv":43643},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"privacy_type":1,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7371881491264848665","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看!!!纯粹的爽文。

丝毫没压制主角，而且主角形象很赞，战.fan哈哈哈哈，但也有正常人情感思维，怎么说呢，总是能在习惯主角的形象后突然来上一下情感升华。总之有笑点，有感动，有温情吧，当然主要是纯粹的爽文!

目前无暧.昧无cp，毕竟你能指望战.fan主角拥有爱情? （∶

以及背景设定真的超赞，有承接作者上本书背景，算是很多年之后蓝星人族发展到顶峰的时刻。

不得不说爽文看多了，像这种主角可以肆意妄为，背后有人托底的文才是真的爽!

而且不是压制主角换来的，主角形象位格档次都还在，第四天灾可不是开玩笑的，什么虚空之皇、极.端主义啥的多多益善[奸笑]

总结：背景设定很大，期待展开发展的点很多，除了字数太少没缺点，五星推荐!!!","text_exts":[{"e":252,"s":248,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177421011659CD2C89%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227371881491264848665%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227355277290973973528%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716407074,"group_id":"7355277290973973528","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8bETBkRjt5wD0VqUWuFzL0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fdb750b326d5498d8d993923852930ed~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791603&x-signature=QfePmCYv6JPGRfS52wM6Zb4M9wo%3D","user_id":"896814424802144","user_name":"星星🌟点灯★"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"896814424802144","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355277290973973528","book_info":{"abstract":"【本书为《修仙很难？我无限回档就行了》的后传！】
